name: io.github.jackson-brooks/steam-local-mcp
description: A Windows Steam MCP server with local client controls and optional Steam Web API insights.

environmentVariables.name: STEAM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional Steam Web API key for account-library and recently-played tools.

environmentVariables.name: STEAM_ID
environmentVariables.description: Optional 64-bit Steam ID used with STEAM_API_KEY for account-library tools.
